```{r Partial Mantel Tests}
print(partial_mantel_env_geo_sess_18S)

cat("\n--- Geographic controlling for Environment ---\n")
print(partial_mantel_geo_env_18S)
print(partial_mantel_geo_env_mot_18S)
print(partial_mantel_geo_env_sess_18S)
```


# Multiple REgression on Distance Matricies (MRM)
```{r}
# Convert distance objects to vectors
# All samples
bc_dist_vec_all_18S <- as.vector(all_distance_dist_18S)
env_dist_vec_all_18S <- as.vector(log_env_dist_all_18S)
geo_dist_vec_all_18S <- as.vector(log1p(geo_dist_all_dist_matched))

# Motile
bc_dist_vec_mot_18S <- as.vector(mot_distance_dist_18S)
env_dist_vec_mot_18S <- as.vector(log_env_dist_motile_18S)
geo_dist_vec_mot_18S <- as.vector(log1p(geo_dist_mot_dist_matched))

# Sessile
bc_dist_vec_sess_18S <- as.vector(sess_distance_dist_18S)
env_dist_vec_sess_18S <- as.vector(log_env_dist_sessile_18S)
geo_dist_vec_sess_18S <- as.vector(log1p(geo_dist_sess_dist_matched))

# Create matched dataframes
matched_data_all_18S <- data.frame(
  bc_dist = bc_dist_vec_all_18S,
  log_env_dist = env_dist_vec_all_18S,
  log_geo_dist = geo_dist_vec_all_18S
)

matched_data_mot_18S <- data.frame(
  bc_dist_mot = bc_dist_vec_mot_18S,
  log_env_dist_mot = env_dist_vec_mot_18S,
  log_geo_dist_mot = geo_dist_vec_mot_18S
)

matched_data_sess_18S <- data.frame(
  bc_dist_sess = bc_dist_vec_sess_18S,
  log_env_dist_sess = env_dist_vec_sess_18S,
  log_geo_dist_sess = geo_dist_vec_sess_18S
)

# Run MRM models
mrm_log_result_all_18S <- ecodist::MRM(
  matched_data_all_18S$bc_dist ~ matched_data_all_18S$log_env_dist + matched_data_all_18S$log_geo_dist, 
  nperm = 9999
)

mrm_log_result_mot_18S <- ecodist::MRM(
  matched_data_mot_18S$bc_dist_mot ~ matched_data_mot_18S$log_env_dist_mot + matched_data_mot_18S$log_geo_dist_mot, 
  nperm = 9999
)

mrm_log_result_sess_18S <- ecodist::MRM(
  matched_data_sess_18S$bc_dist_sess ~ matched_data_sess_18S$log_env_dist_sess + matched_data_sess_18S$log_geo_dist_sess, 
  nperm = 9999
)

# View results
cat("\n=== MRM RESULTS (DEPTH + TURBIDITY ONLY) ===\n")
cat("\n--- All Samples ---\n")
print(mrm_log_result_all_18S)

cat("\n--- Motile Samples ---\n")
print(mrm_log_result_mot_18S)

cat("\n--- Sessile Samples ---\n")
print(mrm_log_result_sess_18S)
```

# Extract and Export Results
```{r Extract and Export geoVenv Results}
# Function to extract Mantel results
extract_mantel_results <- function(mantel_env_all, mantel_geo_all, 
                                  mantel_env_mot, mantel_geo_mot,
                                  mantel_env_sess, mantel_geo_sess) {
  
  # Extract values from Mantel test objects
  mantel_results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = c("All_species", "Motile", "Sessile", "All_species", "Motile", "Sessile"),
    Distance_Type = c(rep("Environmental", 3), rep("Geographic", 3)),
    Mantel_r = c(
      mantel_env_all$statistic,
      mantel_env_mot$statistic, 
      mantel_env_sess$statistic,
      mantel_geo_all$statistic,
      mantel_geo_mot$statistic,
      mantel_geo_sess$statistic
    ),
    P_value = c(
      mantel_env_all$signif,
      mantel_env_mot$signif,
      mantel_env_sess$signif,
      mantel_geo_all$signif,
      mantel_geo_mot$signif,
      mantel_geo_sess$signif
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add significance codes
  mantel_results$Significance <- ifelse(mantel_results$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                       ifelse(mantel_results$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                             ifelse(mantel_results$P_value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  
  return(mantel_results)
}

# Function to extract Partial Mantel results
extract_partial_mantel_results <- function(partial_mantel_env_geo, partial_mantel_geo_env,
                                          partial_mantel_env_geo_mot, partial_mantel_geo_env_mot,
                                          partial_mantel_env_geo_sess, partial_mantel_geo_env_sess) {
  
  partial_mantel_results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = c("All_species", "Motile", "Sessile", "All_species", "Motile", "Sessile"),
    Test_Variable = c(rep("Environmental_controlling_Geographic", 3), 
                      rep("Geographic_controlling_Environmental", 3)),
    Partial_Mantel_r = c(
      partial_mantel_env_geo$statistic,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_mot$statistic,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_sess$statistic,
      partial_mantel_geo_env$statistic,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_mot$statistic,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_sess$statistic
    ),
    P_value = c(
      partial_mantel_env_geo$signif,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_mot$signif,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_sess$signif,
      partial_mantel_geo_env$signif,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_mot$signif,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_sess$signif
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add significance codes
  partial_mantel_results$Significance <- ifelse(partial_mantel_results$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                               ifelse(partial_mantel_results$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                                     ifelse(partial_mantel_results$P_value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  
  return(partial_mantel_results)
}

# Function to extract MRM results
extract_mrm_results <- function(mrm_result_all, mrm_result_mot, mrm_result_sess) {
  
  mrm_results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = c("All_species", "All_species", "Motile", "Motile", "Sessile", "Sessile"),
    Variable = c("Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance", 
                 "Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance",
                 "Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance"),
    Beta_Coefficient = c(
      mrm_result_all$coef[2,1],  # Environmental coefficient
      mrm_result_all$coef[3,1],  # Geographic coefficient
      mrm_result_mot$coef[2,1],  # Environmental coefficient
      mrm_result_mot$coef[3,1],  # Geographic coefficient
      mrm_result_sess$coef[2,1], # Environmental coefficient
      mrm_result_sess$coef[3,1]  # Geographic coefficient
    ),
    P_value = c(
      mrm_result_all$coef[2,2],  # Environmental p-value
      mrm_result_all$coef[3,2],  # Geographic p-value
      mrm_result_mot$coef[2,2],  # Environmental p-value
      mrm_result_mot$coef[3,2],  # Geographic p-value
      mrm_result_sess$coef[2,2], # Environmental p-value
      mrm_result_sess$coef[3,2]  # Geographic p-value
    ),
    Model_R2 = c(
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[1]
    ),
    Model_P_value = c(
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[2]
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add significance codes
  mrm_results$Significance <- ifelse(mrm_results$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                    ifelse(mrm_results$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                          ifelse(mrm_results$P_value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  
  return(mrm_results)
}

# Extract results
mantel_results_18S <- extract_mantel_results(
  mantel_env_all_18S, mantel_geo_all_18S,
  mantel_env_mot_18S, mantel_geo_mot_18S,
  mantel_env_sess_18S, mantel_geo_sess_18S
)

partial_mantel_results_18S <- extract_partial_mantel_results(
  partial_mantel_env_geo_18S, partial_mantel_geo_env_18S,
  partial_mantel_env_geo_mot_18S, partial_mantel_geo_env_mot_18S,
  partial_mantel_env_geo_sess_18S, partial_mantel_geo_env_sess_18S
)

mrm_results_18S <- extract_mrm_results(
  mrm_log_result_all_18S, 
  mrm_log_result_mot_18S, 
  mrm_log_result_sess_18S
)

# Export to CSV
write.csv(mantel_results_18S, 
          "/Path/to/csvfile", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(partial_mantel_results_18S, 
          "/Path/to/csvfile", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(mrm_results_18S, 
          "/Path/to/csvfile", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```


# Create Geo VS Env Plots
```{r Create geo v env plots}
# Function to extract Mantel results
extract_mantel_results <- function(mantel_env_all, mantel_geo_all, 
                                  mantel_env_mot, mantel_geo_mot,
                                  mantel_env_sess, mantel_geo_sess) {
  
  # Extract values from Mantel test objects
  mantel_results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = c("All_species", "Motile", "Sessile", "All_species", "Motile", "Sessile"),
    Distance_Type = c(rep("Environmental", 3), rep("Geographic", 3)),
    Mantel_r = c(
      mantel_env_all$statistic,
      mantel_env_mot$statistic, 
      mantel_env_sess$statistic,
      mantel_geo_all$statistic,
      mantel_geo_mot$statistic,
      mantel_geo_sess$statistic
    ),
    P_value = c(
      mantel_env_all$signif,
      mantel_env_mot$signif,
      mantel_env_sess$signif,
      mantel_geo_all$signif,
      mantel_geo_mot$signif,
      mantel_geo_sess$signif
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add significance codes
  mantel_results$Significance <- ifelse(mantel_results$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                       ifelse(mantel_results$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                             ifelse(mantel_results$P_value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  
  return(mantel_results)
}

# Function to extract Partial Mantel results
extract_partial_mantel_results <- function(partial_mantel_env_geo, partial_mantel_geo_env,
                                          partial_mantel_env_geo_mot, partial_mantel_geo_env_mot,
                                          partial_mantel_env_geo_sess, partial_mantel_geo_env_sess) {
  
  partial_mantel_results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = c("All_species", "Motile", "Sessile", "All_species", "Motile", "Sessile"),
    Test_Variable = c(rep("Environmental_controlling_Geographic", 3), 
                      rep("Geographic_controlling_Environmental", 3)),
    Partial_Mantel_r = c(
      partial_mantel_env_geo$statistic,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_mot$statistic,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_sess$statistic,
      partial_mantel_geo_env$statistic,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_mot$statistic,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_sess$statistic
    ),
    P_value = c(
      partial_mantel_env_geo$signif,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_mot$signif,
      partial_mantel_env_geo_sess$signif,
      partial_mantel_geo_env$signif,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_mot$signif,
      partial_mantel_geo_env_sess$signif
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add significance codes
  partial_mantel_results$Significance <- ifelse(partial_mantel_results$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                               ifelse(partial_mantel_results$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                                     ifelse(partial_mantel_results$P_value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  
  return(partial_mantel_results)
}

# Function to extract MRM results
extract_mrm_results <- function(mrm_result_all, mrm_result_mot, mrm_result_sess) {
  
  mrm_results <- data.frame(
    Dataset = c("All_species", "All_species", "Motile", "Motile", "Sessile", "Sessile"),
    Variable = c("Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance", 
                 "Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance",
                 "Environmental_Distance", "Geographic_Distance"),
    Beta_Coefficient = c(
      mrm_result_all$coef[2,1],  # Environmental coefficient
      mrm_result_all$coef[3,1],  # Geographic coefficient
      mrm_result_mot$coef[2,1],  # Environmental coefficient
      mrm_result_mot$coef[3,1],  # Geographic coefficient
      mrm_result_sess$coef[2,1], # Environmental coefficient
      mrm_result_sess$coef[3,1]  # Geographic coefficient
    ),
    P_value = c(
      mrm_result_all$coef[2,2],  # Environmental p-value
      mrm_result_all$coef[3,2],  # Geographic p-value
      mrm_result_mot$coef[2,2],  # Environmental p-value
      mrm_result_mot$coef[3,2],  # Geographic p-value
      mrm_result_sess$coef[2,2], # Environmental p-value
      mrm_result_sess$coef[3,2]  # Geographic p-value
    ),
    Model_R2 = c(
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[1],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[1]
    ),
    Model_P_value = c(
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_all$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_mot$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[2],
      mrm_result_sess$r.squared[2]
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Add significance codes
  mrm_results$Significance <- ifelse(mrm_results$P_value < 0.001, "***",
                                    ifelse(mrm_results$P_value < 0.01, "**",
                                          ifelse(mrm_results$P_value < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
  
  return(mrm_results)
}

# Extract results
mantel_results_18S <- extract_mantel_results(
  mantel_env_all_18S, mantel_geo_all_18S,
  mantel_env_mot_18S, mantel_geo_mot_18S,
  mantel_env_sess_18S, mantel_geo_sess_18S
)

partial_mantel_results_18S <- extract_partial_mantel_results(
  partial_mantel_env_geo_18S, partial_mantel_geo_env_18S,
  partial_mantel_env_geo_mot_18S, partial_mantel_geo_env_mot_18S,
  partial_mantel_env_geo_sess_18S, partial_mantel_geo_env_sess_18S
)

mrm_results_18S <- extract_mrm_results(
  mrm_log_result_all_18S, 
  mrm_log_result_mot_18S, 
  mrm_log_result_sess_18S
)

# Export to CSV
write.csv(mantel_results_18S, 
          "/Path/to/csvfile", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(partial_mantel_results_18S, 
          "/Path/to/csvfile", 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(mrm_results_18S, 
          "/Path/to/csvfile", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```
